games.name: Superposition Sprint
games.do: Map a causal graph for one loop; run an intervention; compare outcomes to back-door adjusted baseline.
games.make: Causal DAG + do(x) worksheet + run logs.
games.helps: Improves decision accuracy; reduces wasted experiments.
games.accept: Graph reviewed; logs reproducible; KPI met or delta explained.

games.name: Entanglement Sprint
games.do: Hold feature in superposition (flag on/off cohorts); measure drift and collapse to winner.
games.make: Flag plan + cohort split + collapse report.
games.accept: Split recorded; collapse justified; audit trail saved.

games.name: Decoherence Sprint
games.do: Build entanglement between publish and index via a single transaction boundary; prove atomicity.
games.make: Sequence diagram + idempotent script + checksum table.

games.name: Collapse Sprint
games.do: Run chaos drills on the pipeline (kill/slow/cache-miss); auto-recover without manual help.
games.make: Chaos scripts + MTTR timer + RCA notes.

games.name: Bell Sprint
games.do: Prove reversibility with Merkle snapshots; simulate corruption and clean rollback.
games.make: Merkle map + snapshot plan + rollback log.

games.name: Born Sprint
games.do: Run counterfactuals: 'what if we changed X?'; reweight logs; propose optimal policy.
games.make: Counterfactual notebook + policy card.
games.kpi: Policy predicted uplift ≥ 5% validated in micro-test.

games.name: Bayes Sprint
games.do: Reduce publish→search time by removing two queues and batching intelligently.
games.make: Bottleneck map + batching config + timings.

games.name: Causal Sprint
games.do: Detect distribution drift with PSI/KL monitors; trigger guardrails when over threshold.
games.make: Drift dashboard + thresholds + alert log.
games.accept: Two real drifts detected and handled.

games.name: Counterfactual Sprint
games.do: Raise recall without harming precision using query reformulation + synonyms pack.
games.make: Query rules + synonym list + eval set.
